'''Messert Mines Corporation''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company that mined heavy deposits of [[Corthel]] in the air and [[Cortheum]] in the ground on the planet [[Nurstin]] during the waning century of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="GK" /> They were also one of the primary mining companies operating on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Essowyn]]. They brokered mining rights to the [[Thergum Pits]] with the nation of [[Tresycht]], and helped them to first subjugate the nation of [[Yiszte]] with equipment and security forces, allowing them to take control of the entire planet inside four [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="PoG1" />
